patch.value: GH-585: extension alias collision diagnostics for core command groups

GitHub issue #585 reports that an exporter alias can silently graft package subcommands onto an existing core command group, demonstrated by the published pm-graph extension colliding with the new core pm graph group.

Extension activation detects command-group and flattened-alias collisions before dispatch, emits an actionable diagnostic naming both owners, and preserves non-colliding extension commands with contract and installed-package regression coverage.

value.author: codex-sdk-vcs-20260718
value.text: Duplicate check 2026-07-18: exact all-status title search returned zero; AND search across extension command collision/alias/exporter terms found only unrelated closed lineage. Created from https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/585 under universal SDK epic pm-usfg with graph and declarative-extension relations; left open and unclaimed because this PR does not implement it.

author: maintainer-agent
message: Estimate backfill: activation-time collision detection across command groups + flattened aliases, diagnostics naming both owners, installed-package regression
